title: Sizer
description: A small size changing mod for no reason.
body:
A small stupid mod for changing the players size (visually). this idea came to me while playing some minecraft, and i decided, why not make it into a full blown mod. (the mod allows any value from 0.25 up to 2.0 times size) Contributions to code aswell as ideas are welcome! <3 _it is recommended to use [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) with this mod, to access the config (there are now commands for this. check out [this](https://modrinth.com/mod/sizer/version/1.4.2) and [this](https://modrinth.com/mod/sizer/version/1.4.3) for more info)! tho there are keybinds for: enable/disable, bigger, smaller._ **!!!! WARNING !!!!**
This is by no means a serious mod, it was a random idea that popped into my head (a so called "schnapsidee" in german).
